outlook.volatilityExpectation: High volatility expected: Spot price has broken above major Call Walls, placing dealers in a short gamma position. This forces hedging activity that amplifies price movements (buying rallies, selling dips).
outlook.summary: Price (659.8) has escaped the 'options cage' defined by the 655-656 strikes across all expiries. With dealers likely short the heavy Call OI, we are in a positive feedback loop (gamma squeeze) until a new resistance is established. The massive 630 OI cluster acts as a magnetic 'floor' and Max Pain attractor.

levels.motivazione: High OI confluence across 0DTE (26k), WEEKLY (12.8k), and MONTHLY (2.1k). Spot breaking above turns this into structural support.
Dominant OI cluster (174k) representing the primary 'Call Wall' and approximate Max Pain zone. Acts as a strong magnet.
Highest strike in 0DTE with massive OI (43k). Breakout level; if price sustains above, confirms bullish trend.
Significant Monthly OI (1.1k) at spot proximity. Acts as immediate friction for the upward move.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low volatility expected; price pinning likely between strikes
outlook.summary: Market is trapped between the 590 Resonance support and 595 Call Wall resistance. Dealer positioning suggests a tight trading range with suppressed movement.

levels.motivazione: Significant Call Open Interest in all expirations (0DTE, WEEKLY, MONTHLY) creates a structural dealer hedge zone acting as a 'Call Floor', providing strong support.
Dominant Call OI in 0DTE (82k) creates a sticky resistance ceiling. Dealers short gamma here will sell deltas on rallies, capping upside.
Major resistance in Weekly expiry (6.7k OI). Acts as the next target if the 595 level is breached.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed volatility - positive GEX regime with spot far above gamma flip zone
outlook.summary: Strong bullish structure with spot at 6666.75 trading significantly above all visible option strikes (6340-6560). Positive total GEX (0.02B) indicates dealers long gamma, suppressing volatility and supporting prices. Reverse smirk skew confirms bullish bias. Volume-based PCR above 1.0 suggests hedging but positioning remains bullish. No visible resistance above spot - path of least resistance is upward. Key support zones at 6400 (triple resonance) and 6450 (confluence).

levels.motivazione: Highest visible strike with substantial weekly volume (160), acts as structural support boundary below spot
Round number with significant weekly volume (123), natural price attraction and profit-taking zone
Highest 0DTE volume concentration (177), primary intraday price attraction point
Multi-expiry confluence (WEEKLY vol 210 + MONTHLY vol 12), highest weekly volume concentration
